params.prompt: Mobile app UI mockup, 9:16 portrait, flat clean modern design, NO photos, NO people, NO 3D, NO device bezels — just the app UI filling the entire frame. Italian-language word-scramble game called Scramble. STYLE: Light mode. Background #F8F9FA. White card surfaces with soft drop shadow. Rounded corners: 14px on buttons, 22px on cards. Display font: Baloo 2 (rounded friendly sans, weight 800-900) for letters and numbers. Body font: Inter for labels. Primary accent color: vibrant violet #8B5CF6. Text color #111827. Muted text #6B7280. LAYOUT TOP TO BOTTOM: (1) Slim app header 56px tall, white background, subtle bottom border: back arrow icon left, centered logo Blob Party in Baloo 2 bold 700. (2) GameHUD strip white card ~80px: round badge 1/3 on left, in center circular progress ring with violet stroke around timer text 00:38, on right two stacked player chips violet Marco 12 and amber Lisa 7. (3) Hint box light violet tinted background soft violet border: lightbulb icon + Italian text Tocca le tessere in ordine per comporre parole italiane, poi premi Invia. (4) WORD TRAY ROW focal element: white card with 7 letter slots, the FIRST 4 SLOTS are filled with vibrant solid violet #8B5CF6 pill-shaped tiles each containing a bold WHITE letter in Baloo 2: R, O, S, A. Remaining 3 slots empty with dashed grey border. On right edge of tray a small round refresh ↺ icon button with violet outline visible. (5) TILES GRID: 7 large letter tiles in a row ~50x57px each, white background thick violet border bold Baloo 2 letters. The 4 USED tiles (R, O, S, A) are dimmed faded — light grey background, muted grey text, low opacity 0.35. The 3 UNUSED tiles (T, E, I) are vibrant with violet border and dark crisp letters and soft shadow. (6) ACTIONS ROW: small square shuffle icon button, small square backspace ⌫ icon button, big primary submit button labeled Invia filling remaining width in ACTIVE state vibrant violet #8B5CF6 background white bold text soft violet glow shadow. (7) Section header: bold Parole trovate on left, violet text 2 · 7 pt on right. (8) WORDS LIST card white background, 2 rounded rows visible. Top row STORIA bold dark letterspaced with +4 violet on right. Second row ARIE bold with +3 violet on right. Each row subtle background rounded 10px corners. Generous spacing 8-12px between rows, side padding 16px. Mobile-first portrait. Photorealistic UI render quality. No annotations or callouts outside UI. Frame entire interface edge-to-edge.
